rulings.Case Title: LOU GORDON ET AL VS. RICHARD PATRICK GORDON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 9, 2015, line 11. DEFENDANT RICHARD GORDON's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DENIED. Moving party fails to identify in the Notice of Motion or in the Separate Statement the issue to be adjudicated. The only evidence provided in support of this motion is declaration of Charles Oshinuga. This declaration is not referenced in the Points and Authorities or in the Separate Statement. Declaration of Ian Kelly, cited in support of the purportedly undisputed facts, has not been filed or lodged with the Court. Additionally Defendants stipulated that Plaintiffs are his landlords. However Defendants failed to cite any authority for the proposition that one can be a landlord within the meaning of CCP 1161 without some kind of possessory or ownership interest in the demised premises. = (501/REQ)
